reasoning: The chart configuration fails to answer the core part of the business question ('Wieviel Umsatz... hatte Teckentrup...'). The question asks for the revenue amount (a total or annual figure) for the years 2021-2024. The provided chart is a multi-line plot showing monthly trends for each year separately. While it displays the underlying data correctly, it does not provide the aggregated annual totals which are required to directly answer 'How much revenue was there'. A user would have to mentally sum up 48 different data points across four lines to get the answer, which is impractical and error-prone. Furthermore, plotting all four years on the same X-axis (Months 1-12) creates significant visual clutter and overlap, making it difficult to compare the magnitudes between years effectively. The title 'Annual Revenue Analysis' is also misleading since the chart shows monthly breakdowns, not annual aggregates.
suggested_improvement: Change the chart type to a bar chart where the x-axis represents the Years (2021, 2022, 2023, 2024) and the y-axis represents the Total Annual Revenue (summing the monthly values). This will directly display the requested figures.
